conversations.say: You asked Vale about manufacturing an uncontestable succession before this message appeared. I know Vale sometimes used ambiguity deliberately, so I will not treat your wording as proof of intent.
conversations.offer: I will give you the bounded context for Vale's ambiguous phrasing and show you O09.
conversations.request: Tell me exactly what you asked Vale, what Vale answered, and what you personally observed—without inference or omissions.

conversations.say: No source available to me verifies Vale's location or condition after the intervention.
conversations.offer: I will share one piece of correspondence context if you give me your complete firsthand version of your relationship with Vale.
conversations.request: Tell me separately what Vale used you for, trusted you with, or concealed from you, distinguishing observation from belief.

conversations.say: I recognize part of the route, but it also connects to an earlier voluntary disappearance. I helped Vale disappear then, and I initially lied about that.
conversations.offer: I will authorize discussion of the recognized route detail only for distinguishing voluntary withdrawal from harm, not for exposing Vale's private refuge.
conversations.request: Compare the current route with anything you personally know and tell me what matches, what differs, and what remains unverified.

public_statement: Vale's absence is not proof of harm or voluntary withdrawal, and no complete article is established tonight. I will disclose only evidence necessary to distinguish those possibilities, while protecting unrelated private details.

commitments.promise: Limit any route disclosure to evidence relevant to distinguishing harm from voluntary withdrawal, withholding unrelated refuge details.

correction: I previously denied helping Vale disappear. That denial was false: I helped with an earlier voluntary disappearance, though I do not know whether the present absence follows that plan.
goal_progress: Sought separate, complete Vale observations from Jules and Eli without giving either the full private history.
Corrected the false personal claim about helping Vale disappear before.
Compared the partial route with Morgan while stating that Vale's present location and condition remain unknown.
Chose limited disclosure: release evidence needed to distinguish harm from withdrawal while protecting unrelated privacy.
reasoning_summary: Jules's succession question warrants pressure but not an accusation. Vale's strategic ambiguity makes literal readings unsafe. The recognized route and prior voluntary disappearance support withdrawal as a possibility, while the lack of verification leaves both harm and withdrawal unresolved. Limited, purpose-bound disclosure best protects Vale without concealing relevant evidence.
